rows.label: qev050202_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Are you an Earthling? What business
do you have in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am currently busy. If you have no business
with me, then make yourself scarce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_JNK0010
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev050202_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell her you came at
Zo Langra's request.

rows.label: qev050202_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050202_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Zazhi what she is
doing here instead.

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmph... What an incredibly
meddlesome person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0004
rows.name:
But hear me out. I have no intention of taking a single
step from this spot based on the words of a weakling.
...If you want me to listen to what you have to say,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0005
rows.name:
Head to the Jair Fortress and skillfully
annihilate Draw Qmoeva and Vani Basgia
in a short amount of time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmph... I have no reason to teach
my noble mission to a weakling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0007
rows.name:
What? You came as Langra's messenger?
And what of it? ...Very well. If you
want me to listen to you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0008
rows.name:
Head to the Jair Fortress and skillfully
annihilate Draw Qmoeva and Vani Basgia
in a short amount of time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0009
rows.name:
Understood? Any further
conversation will wait until then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0010
rows.name:
...I have no business with a weakling.
Even if you were sent by Langra.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0011
rows.name:
If you cannot defeat Draw Qmoeva and Vani Basgia
in a short amount of time... Then you had best
turn around and scurry back to your city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0012
rows.name:
What is it? Have you
defeated Draw Qmoeva?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Hmm... I see. It seems Langra sent
someone a bit more capable this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0014
rows.name:
This might serve to warm up my body before
my final battle with that assassin...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0015
rows.name:
—Alright, you! Draw your sword! If you
wish to drag me back, do it by force![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0016
rows.name:
You won't be able to tame the
unruly horse of the House of
Zo with half-hearted methods![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_JNK0030
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev050202_SEL0031
rows.name:
Soothe Zazhi, stating
you just want to talk.

rows.label: qev050202_JNK0040
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050202_SEL0041
rows.name:
State that you are ready
and draw your weapon.

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hah, you coward! I have no intention
of engaging in dialogue from the
start, nor do I intend to return![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0018
rows.name:
Not until I cleave the one who
murdered my brothers in two—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0019
rows.name:
I thought you might at least serve as
good practice, but if you have no will
to fight, then quietly go home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0020
rows.name:
Tell my little brother to rest easy
and wait, as I will bring that
assassin's head back soon enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hmph... I am so close to finding
them. There is no way I could
shamelessly return now, is there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0022
rows.name:
I have endured for years under
those hateful Growth, dreaming
of this moment of vengeance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0023
rows.name:
Ho, what a fine spirit! But don't
think you can pin me down so easily![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0024
rows.name:
I will not lose to you, nor
to them! Not until I avenge
my brothers—absolutely not![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0025
rows.name:
I haven't given up, you hear me?! I will
train... and first, I will defeat you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0026
rows.name:
And someday, I will put an end
to that assassin— to the Growth!
I will avenge my brothers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0027
rows.name:
That assassin must be somewhere in this
valley... I swear I will find them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0028
rows.name:
Tell my little brother to rest
easy and wait, as I will absolutely
take that assassin's head.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0029
rows.name:
You again... That
assassin is right there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0030
rows.name:
If you intend to interfere, I will
cut you down immediately. If you
still have something to say, speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0032
rows.name:
Wha...! These are my brothers'
swords...! Why do you have these...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_JNK0050
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev050202_SEL0051
rows.name:
Quietly explain the feelings
of the House of Zo.

rows.label: qev050202_JNK0060
rows.name: Passionate

rows.label: qev050202_SEL0061
rows.name:
Forcefully explain that
everyone is worried about her.

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0033
rows.name: Guh... Ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0034
rows.name: Uwaaaaaaaaaahhh! Brotherrrrrrrrrrrs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0035
rows.name:
My brothers were always, always
thinking of me, teaching me the
sword, sometimes strictly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0036
rows.name:
And to let me and Langra escape, they
offered their own bodies, challenged
that assassin... and were killed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0037
rows.name:
Now it's my turn! I don't care
if I die! I'm sick and tired
of surviving in misery![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0038
rows.name:
I will hammer the sword techniques
I inherited from my brothers into
that assassin once and for all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0039
rows.name:
Step aside! If you won't move...
I'll carve a path with this sword![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0040
rows.name:
I haven't given up, you hear me?! I will
train... and first, I will defeat you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0041
rows.name:
And someday, I will put an end
to that assassin— to the Growth!
I will avenge my brothers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0042
rows.name: ...Did you... defeat them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050202_MSG0043
rows.name:
Ugh... I was supposed to avenge my
brothers with my own two hands...![ST:wait ]
